name: Morgan Stanley DEPOSITARY SHARES REP 1/1000TH SHARES FIXED/FLTG PREFERRED STOCK SERIES E
summary: Morgan Stanley DEPOSITARY SHARES REP 1/1000TH SHARES FIXED/FLTG PREFERRED STOCK SERIES E represents depositary shares, each representing a 1/1000th interest in a share of Morgan Stanley's Fixed/Floating Preferred Stock Series E. The preferred stock pays a fixed dividend rate for a specified period, after which it converts to a floating rate. This gives investors access to preferred stock dividends.
